summary:
The provided evidence shows no association between HER2 immunoreactivity and prognosis in locally advanced urothelial carcinoma patients undergoing adjuvant M-VEC therapy. Thus, based on current literature, HER2 immunoreactivity does not offer prognostic value for these patients.  

(Note: This summary strictly adheres to only clinically pertinent facts from Agent2’s original analysis.)
